g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Cypress Real World App')
sendPrompt('How is the automation repo structured?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the GitHub Actions workflow?')
sendPrompt('What happens during npm ci in CI?')
sendPrompt('How are secrets injected in GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('How does CI start the Real World App?')
sendPrompt('How does the test run work across browsers?')
sendPrompt('What is included in the Playwright HTML report artifact?')
